Start a build
Case studies

Projects that prove how I engineer.

These are not gallery pieces. They are systems where architecture, data flow, and trust matter more than cosmetic novelty.

What I highlight

I focus on constraints, architecture decisions, and how the system behaves under pressure, not just the surface result.

What I keep private

I show topology and engineering judgment without exposing formulas, thresholds, or sensitive business logic.

Trading infrastructure

SMC SuperFIB

A cross-runtime execution and monitoring system that synchronises indicator logic, API state, trading clients, and dashboard visibility around one source of truth.

Pine Script MT5 React WordPress API

The architecture keeps the API authoritative while the execution and dashboard layers stay readable for operators.

What made it hard
  • Parity across different runtimes and trading surfaces.
  • State drift caused by timing differences and stale inputs.
  • Operator trust when the UI and the execution layer disagree.
Read the full SuperFIB case study
Community finance

Stokvel Society

A fintech platform for contribution tracking, trust-layer ledger handling, and payout visibility designed around clarity for members and administrators.

Astro Ledger logic Reporting Product UX

The product focuses on keeping money movement understandable, auditable, and easy to verify.

What made it hard
  • Translating trust-heavy community workflows into dependable software behavior.
  • Keeping contribution and payout state readable for non-technical users.
  • Balancing straightforward product language with serious financial responsibility.
Read the full Stokvel Society case study
SS Developers

I build trading, fintech, and data-heavy systems for teams that need the software to stay correct when the environment gets messy.
